subcodes.first_line: O thou blessed and auspicious branch, tender sapling of the garden of the All-Merciful! It is eventide, and despite my weakness I take up my pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاخ فرخنده و خجسته نهال حدیقه رحمانیه وقت عصر است با کمال ضعف قلم برداشته
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
